category_sources: Official GitHub README calls EPUBCheck the official conformance checker for EPUB publications.
source_facts.description says it validates EPUB files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project name EPUBCheck.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states usage and contributor documentation is available on the EPUBCheck wiki.
Official W3C publishing site hosts EPUBCheck documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/w3c/epubcheck; repo lookup intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes EPUBCheck as a standalone command-line tool and Java library for EPUB conformance checking.
source_facts.description says it validates EPUB files version 2.0 and later.
